text:
The roadmap contains only mathematical targets (Universal Covers, Jacobian Challenge, Reductive Groups, PDE). This PR only edits `AGENTS.md` and `README.md` — documentation about the auto-merge pipeline and review infrastructure. There is no path from documentation updates to any of the four mathematical roadmap targets.

TAUCETI-VERDICT-af5bb96b0aa5c3b0c19d73e5
